channel.title: Azure Management Group Design on Larry James Henry
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Management Group Design on Larry James Henry

item.title: Design Your Azure Management Group and Subscription Hierarchy
item.description: The hierarchy is the first thing you build in a landing zone, and it is the hardest thing to change later. Management Groups (MGs) provide a scope above the subscription level, allowing you to apply Azure Policies and RBAC roles that cascade down to every child resource. A well-designed tree enables you to govern 1,000 subscriptions with the same effort as one. A poorly designed tree—typically one that mirrors a fluctuating organizational chart—leads to constant refactoring and security gaps.
